item.name: Sanuwa Horn
item.description: A small bone whistle that, when blown, emits a piercing tone that resembles the cry of a sanuwa fledgling. Use to summon your sanuwa mount.

mount.name: Sanuwa
mount.action: Summon forth your sanuwa, specially bred and trained for riding by Gundu merchant Luna Vanu.
mount.description: Countless turns of the sun did Luna Vanu train this wild sanuwa to obey the orders of man, and for many moons did he wait for one he deemed worthy of taking up this noble cloudkin's reins. Wait, he did, until you arrived.
mount.tooltip:
Wild sanuwa fierce
as monsoon rains.
- Gunu Vanu
